untranslatable_reason: This signal is a multi-leg options strategy (butterfly spread) that requires explicit strike selection, leg quantities, and option Greeks. The backtest engine indicators list contains only price-based and technical indicators. Options strategy execution requires: (1) strike price selection relative to current underlying price, (2) specification of buy/sell legs with exact contracts, (3) tracking of individual leg P&L and Greeks (delta, gamma, theta, vega). Standard OHLCV indicators cannot parametrize these multi-leg option construction rules.
translation_notes: MCMILLAN_DRY_91 describes a static options structure (1 long call lower strike, 2 short calls middle strike, 1 long call higher strike) with profit maximization at middle strike. This is a position architecture rule, not a market timing signal. Implementation requires an options-aware backtest engine with strike mapping, contract selection, and Greeks modeling capabilities.
